_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve linear_elasticity#0: catalog falsification. Existing pitfall 'Use VectorH1(...), NOT H1(mesh, dim=2)' is wrong — both work and give identical solve results to 1e-16. The real distinction is layout: VectorH1 has ndof=42, dim=1 (flat); H1(dim=2) has ndof=21, dim=2 (block). Their total scalar dofs match. Also confirms MatrixValued(H1, symmetric=True) is real and gfu.components returns tuple of ComponentGridFunction. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
